name: Sound/Unsound: Internet Songlines by Jan Swinburne
description: A solo exhibition presenting the artwork of artist Jan Swinburne, produced as part of the Rendezvous with Madness Artist in Residence Program.

name: Seussical: The Musical
description:
A vibrant stage adaptation that weaves together iconic characters and stories from the world of Dr. Seuss.

Horton the Elephant stumbles upon a tiny speck of dust containing an entire community, the Whos of Who-ville. When he alone hears their call for help, Horton makes a bold promise to protect them, even as doubt spreads and he faces mounting danger. Along the way, Gertrude McFuzz struggles to find her confidence, Jojo searches for belonging, and The Cat in the Hat leads us through a world where imagination challenges reality and compassion changes everything.

At its heart, Seussical is a story about loyalty, self-discovery, and standing up for others, even when you're the only one who believes.

This is Hillcrest Village Community Players' milestone fifth season show featuring local talent from across the city. You don't want to miss this!
